---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Raskolnikov
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Agent / conversation
- [ ] Tool integration
- [ ] AI provider
- [ ] TUI / UI
- [ ] Session / logging
- [ ] CLI / config
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging / distribution
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any relevant mockups, references, or examples from other tools.
